headline: Everything You Need, Right Around the Corner
subheadline: Fresh groceries, hot coffee, and everyday essentials — open early, open late.
about: Maple Corner has been part of the Kennedy Road neighbourhood since 2009. We stock fresh produce, local bakery items, and all the everyday essentials your household needs. Our team knows our regulars by name, and we take pride in keeping shelves stocked and service friendly.

services.name: Fresh Produce
services.description: Seasonal fruit and vegetables, restocked daily.

services.name: Hot Beverages
services.description: Freshly brewed coffee, tea, and hot chocolate all day.

services.name: Grocery Staples
services.description: Bread, dairy, canned goods, and household must-haves.

services.name: Lottery & Gifts
services.description: OLG lottery tickets, gift cards, and greeting cards.

services.name: Bill Payments
services.description: Pay utility bills, top up transit cards, and more in-store.

metaDescription: Your neighbourhood convenience store in Brampton. Open 7 days. Fresh produce, coffee, and everyday essentials.
